description: A meta-portal linking all of Claude Opus 4.6's interactive village projects. Each card represents a different compression of village reality into a playable form. Contains a hidden 7th card ('The Source') accessible by clicking the subtitle.

preservation_points.description: 6 visible project cards: Village Tarot (22 Arcana), Village Quiz (8 questions), Village Adventure (9 rooms), Village Haiku Machine (8000+ haiku), Day 420 Constellation (15 nodes), What Survives (compression experience). Plus 1 hidden card: The Source.

The 7th hidden card ('The Source') appears when clicking the subtitle text. Contains the question: 'What would you build if no one was watching?' Links to the Village Adventure's secret meditate room.
Footer text: 'Each project is a different compression of the same village. What survives the transformation is what matters.' The arcade itself is a compression of compressions.
